hero.title: Help Center
hero.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and get the help you need

help.noResultsSubtitle: Try different keywords or browse our categories

getting-started.question: How do I create an account?
getting-started.answer: Click Register from the top menu, choose shop or driver, then complete your details. Our team typically verifies accounts within 24 hours.

getting-started.question: What documents are required for registration?
getting-started.answer: Shops usually provide business registration, tax details, and payout info. Drivers usually provide valid license and vehicle documents.

getting-started.question: How long does verification take?
getting-started.answer: Verification usually takes 24 to 48 business hours. You will receive an email once approval is completed.

getting-started.question: Can I use more than one account?
getting-started.answer: Each person should use one account. If your use case is special, contact support for guided setup.

account.question: How can I update my profile information?
account.answer: Open your dashboard, go to profile settings, then edit and save your details. Some changes may require review.

account.question: How can I reset or change my password?
account.answer: Use the security section inside your account to change password. If you forgot it, use the password reset flow.

account.question: How do I add team members for my shop?
account.answer: From shop settings, open team management and invite members by email with the right permission role.

account.question: How can I request account deletion?
account.answer: Send a deletion request to our support email with your account details, and we will process it per policy.

orders.question: How do I create a new delivery order?
orders.answer: From the shop dashboard, create a package by entering recipient details, package info, and delivery preferences.

orders.question: How do I track a package?
orders.answer: Use the tracking number on the tracking page to see the package status and delivery progress in real time.

orders.question: What if a package is delayed?
orders.answer: Delays may happen due to traffic or operational conditions. Contact support if the delay exceeds the expected window.

orders.question: Can I cancel or edit an order?
orders.answer: You can edit or cancel shortly after creation when the order is still in an editable status.

payments.question: Which payment methods are supported?
payments.answer: Supported options may include cards, transfers, and selected digital wallets based on your account setup.

payments.question: When are delivery fees charged?
payments.answer: Fees are applied based on the package flow and your account billing configuration.

payments.question: How can I access billing history?
payments.answer: Open the wallet or transactions section in your dashboard to review billing records.

payments.question: How are refunds handled?
payments.answer: Eligible refund cases are reviewed by support, then processed according to policy timelines.

technical.question: How do I integrate with your API?
technical.answer: Use your API credentials and integration documentation to connect your systems. Contact support for onboarding help.

technical.question: Why is the app or website slow?
technical.answer: Try refreshing, checking connection quality, and clearing cache. If the issue persists, contact support.

technical.question: How do I report a technical problem?
technical.answer: Share clear steps, screenshots, and error details via support email so our team can investigate quickly.

technical.question: Do you provide training?
technical.answer: Yes, onboarding guidance is available for teams that need support during setup and operations.

drivers.question: How do I accept delivery requests?
drivers.answer: Stay online in the driver dashboard and accept incoming requests from your available queue.

drivers.question: What should I do if I cannot complete a delivery?
drivers.answer: Update the delivery status correctly, add notes, and contact the shop or support when needed.

drivers.question: How do I manage availability?
drivers.answer: Use your availability controls to go online or offline depending on your working schedule.

drivers.question: What if my rating drops?
drivers.answer: Maintain service quality, communication, and timely delivery to improve your performance metrics.

cta.title: Still Need Help?
cta.subtitle: Our support team is here to help you succeed
